data.title: KIP Protocol Co-founder's latest response: The previous statement was inappropriately worded, but it will not be deleted to show transparency
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Julian, co-founder of KIP Protocol, quoted the official post of KIP Protocol on the X platform: "This tweet is inappropriately worded. There are reasons for doing this (LIBRA project). But we will not delete it to maintain full transparency."

data.title: Ethereum Whale Sells Holdings for Significant Profit
data.description: According to PANews, a notable Ethereum investor, who had acquired 3,000 ETH at $2,615 each two weeks ago, has recently sold all their holdings. This transaction, monitored by on-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa, resulted in a profit of $348,000. The sale occurred five hours prior to the report.

data.title: KIP Protocol co-founder responded to Solayer team members’ box opening behavior: Come to me, LIBRA is not a scam
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In response to the "box opening" behavior of Solayer team member Chaofan Shou against KIP Protocol team members, KIP Protocol co-founder Julian responded: "Come to me. This is no rug. If it was a scam, we wouldn't have received so much support for the launch. Just because you lost money doesn't mean it's a scam." In response, Solayer team member Chaofan Shou replied, "The LIBRA incident is a scam, and I will find every one of you. From Vietnam to Singapore to the United States. You are in trouble."

data.title: KIP Protocol co-founder: We are not hiding, there is no need to track us
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Regarding the LIBRA token project, Beanie, a member of the Gm Capital team, posted on the X platform, "I never really want anyone in this industry to go to jail. Not even SBF, Do Kwon, definitely not anyone. I always take the risk and responsibility for my often poor trading decisions. But the people on the KIP Protocol team need to be sent straight to hell. Lock them up." KIP Protocol co-founder Julian later responded: "I'm here. I'm not hiding. No need to track, we're not hiding."

data.title: Animoca Brands: Not involved in the launch of LIBRA tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Animoca Brands officially issued a statement on the X platform to clarify that Animoca Brands invested in KIP Protocol in February 2024 along with many other investors, but Animoca Brands, Animoca Ventures, and Open Campus did not understand or participate in the launch and development of the LIBRA token.

data.title: KIP Protocol Co-founder: LIBRA project funds are still on the chain, KIP only assists in management as a fund distributor
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News KIP Protocol co-founder Julian posted on social media that, as mentioned in the original tweet of Argentine President Mile a few hours ago, the Libertad project aims to boost the Argentine economy by funding small projects and local businesses, supporting those who seek to develop businesses and contribute to national development.
Currently, these funds are still on the chain and no SOL will be moved. KIP Protocol's main role in this project is to help allocate funds to Argentine companies, not tokens, let alone market makers. It should be noted that LIBRA has no pre-sale, and all tokens are sold through a one-sided liquidity pool.
KIP Protocol will develop a plan to run the Libertad project based on the initial goals. No SOL will be used outside the purpose of running Project Viva La Libertad. More details will be announced later.
